{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231851412730779B4F2D45C98563"}"},"total":859},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7573324131784475417","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的，对比其他科举文剧情发展很完整了，而且在科举方面也没有太操之过急相反后期的剧情跌宕起伏，让人挺有看下去的欲望推荐[已种草][已种草][已种草]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763305340,"group_id":"7530977085884484633","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不行就弃","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw5z8px7X9HHCxu2bt01OsyMdAQxxRfyEmqS666UnSt4","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f0307f67bd2e4c878fe91fc99eb288a1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794808&x-signature=XEsAzR1aHeBdaUpfzDMJQzyGlk8%3D","user_id":"1799219892988173","user_name":"多如牛毛的火原和树"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1799219892988173","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7530977085884484633","book_info":{"abstract":"上辈子，方子期是华五高校理科博士。
　　这辈子，穿越到大梁农家！
　　贫困的家，偷学的爹，偏心的爷，十次落榜的大伯……
　　在这个万般皆下品惟有读书高的时代，方子期只能勒紧裤腰带走上科举路！
　　六岁开蒙！
　　八岁下场！
　　十四岁科举及第！
　　二十岁外放封疆大吏！
　　收琉球！灭扶桑！征南洋！
　　北逐蛮夷，胡马不敢饮黄河之水；南抚百越，瘴烟尽化桑麻之香！
　　旌旗所指，草木皆识汉家法度；马蹄所至，沙石亦染华夏文章！
　　方子期：“凡阳光所照之地，皆为我土！凡江河所至之处，皆为我臣！”
　　“所谓我土，不止于舆图所载；所谓我臣，不限于编户之民！”
　　“昔年全族以血肉铺路，助我踏过科举荆棘；今日臣持天子剑，当为大梁拓万里疆！”
　　皇上笑着问他要什么赏赐，方子期叩首：“臣别无所求，只求为家乡做点事 —— 比如，给当年陪着臣熬夜苦读的老黄狗，讨个‘御赐忠犬’的诰命牌，让它也风光风光！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c0792a49fd84548b7dfe3c96bd9dc81","author":"煮夫","author_id":"","book_id":"7530977085884484633","book_name":"科举：大梁魅魔，肩抗两京十三省","book_short_name":"乱世状元","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0e8e8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7530977124958618137","read_count":"87474","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2011107"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"967","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空,科举,争霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/729359ba1135292e0240265bedf90dd6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447101&x-signature=GSeqk%2BuMl06q35azcyMqR8yXPMg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1591690293425175","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"603"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231851412730779B4F2D45C98563"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读32小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":20449,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":116761,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":34561},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7568506095180530494","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看的一本科举文，目前无cp，读起来很爽，剧情发展不落俗套，各种小高潮不断，也有很多搞笑情节。
男主虽然是穿越的，但他一直在提升学问，让自己更加的适应古代，不是那种一上来就开挂的。
其实比较金手指的是男主的社交能力，是真的情商高会哄人，不愧是大梁魅魔[捂脸]（不过吸引的大多都是男人哈哈）。
特别喜欢各方势力博弈的内容，不过前期主角都是依靠大腿摆平的，让人觉得有些隔靴搔痒。但剧情发现到现在，主角已入仕途有一些底蕴，期待主角可以厚积薄发大展拳脚！作者大大加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762182872,"group_id":"7530977085884484633","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N37vva05903RQbHR3bzLaHTOwxkpOfkYi/75hZ/qaZxG","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0e16a50789cf445b949eb285e2d085db~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788370&x-signature=6auLGCfb9ThY1kOvDeGMLwzf7iE%3D","user_id":"2700011330347847","user_name":"月流花"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2700011330347847","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7530977085884484633","book_info":{"abstract":"上辈子，方子期是华五高校理科博士。
　　这辈子，穿越到大梁农家！
　　贫困的家，偷学的爹，偏心的爷，十次落榜的大伯……
　　在这个万般皆下品惟有读书高的时代，方子期只能勒紧裤腰带走上科举路！
　　六岁开蒙！
　　八岁下场！
　　十四岁科举及第！
　　二十岁外放封疆大吏！
　　收琉球！灭扶桑！征南洋！
　　北逐蛮夷，胡马不敢饮黄河之水；南抚百越，瘴烟尽化桑麻之香！
　　旌旗所指，草木皆识汉家法度；马蹄所至，沙石亦染华夏文章！
　　方子期：“凡阳光所照之地，皆为我土！凡江河所至之处，皆为我臣！”
　　“所谓我土，不止于舆图所载；所谓我臣，不限于编户之民！”
　　“昔年全族以血肉铺路，助我踏过科举荆棘；今日臣持天子剑，当为大梁拓万里疆！”
　　皇上笑着问他要什么赏赐，方子期叩首：“臣别无所求，只求为家乡做点事 —— 　　贫困的家，偷学的爹，偏心的爷，十次落榜的大伯……
　　在这个万般皆下品惟有读书高的时代，方子期只能勒紧裤腰带走上科举路！
